message.content:
Search the codebase at D:\project\info-gitlab\oa for anything related to "Jira/Confluence执行人" or "X项目Jira" or "Jira/Confluence" executor logic. I need to understand:
1. How the system determines which person is assigned as "X项目Jira/Confluence执行人" vs "项目Jira/Confluence执行人"
2. The business logic and code that makes this determination

Search thoroughly across all three sub-projects (oa-core, oa-server, oa-frontend). Look for:
- Keywords: "Jira", "Confluence", "执行人", "executor", "jira_confluence"
- Any approval flow or workflow related to Jira/Confluence account provisioning
- Database tables or models related to this

Be very thorough - search with multiple patterns.
